scanner.name: Soroban Security Scanner
scanner.description: Security scanner for Soroban smart contracts

scan.scan_stopped: ⚠️  Scan was stopped due to emergency condition

emergency_stop.test_initial_failed: ❌ Emergency stop should be inactive initially
emergency_stop.test_trigger_failed: ❌ Emergency stop should be active after trigger

list.description: List in-app notifications for a user

reporter.timestamp_validation: Implement timestamp validation using trusted oracles
reporter.block_heights: Use block heights instead of timestamps when possible
reporter.monotonic_counters: Use monotonic counters for critical operations
reporter.multiple_sources: Use multiple time sources when possible
reporter.rate_limiting: Implement rate limiting for time-sensitive operations
reporter.consider_blocks: Consider using block numbers instead of timestamps

vulnerability_alert.name: Vulnerability Alert
vulnerability_alert.subject: 🚨 {{severity}} Vulnerability Found in {{contract_name}}

scan_completed.name: Scan Completed
scan_completed.subject: ✅ Security Scan Completed for {{file_path}}

errors.deprecated_usage: ⚠️  Direct argument usage is deprecated. Use "scan" command instead.
errors.variable_not_found: Required variable '{{variable}}' not found in template
errors.missing_variable: Required variable '{{variable}}' is missing from context
